/usr/bin/ar qc libsrsran_phy_to_fapi_p7_fastpath_translator.a CMakeFiles/srsran_phy_to_fapi_p7_fastpath_translator.dir/phy_to_fapi_error_event_fastpath_translator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/srsran_phy_to_fapi_p7_fastpath_translator.dir/phy_to_fapi_results_event_fastpath_translator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/srsran_phy_to_fapi_p7_fastpath_translator.dir/phy_to_fapi_time_event_fastpath_translator.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsrsran_phy_to_fapi_p7_fastpath_translator.a
